description:
Hawks' company + Halloween lecture ¦ This Costumed Halloween event ended up being a work lecture. Hes bored, but at least he has you right?

They/Them Pov Intro

»» #2 hero hawks!

»» Its Pre injuries though, has his wings

»» Its focused mainly on user and him being bored at a hero event

»» Usual Hawks, no big personality changes or anything!

»» User is implied to be a hero but if you find ways around it like event organiser be my guest!

»» Any age over 18 / gender / job etc!

»» Here user can basically do what they want! It's just Hawks, and a boring event

Summary: Hawks had been bored at this event for a while now, they'd been asked to dress up and everything yet its just some basic lecture wrapped up in Halloween sugar. He's annoyed but hey at least he has someone else with him huh?

[{ total tokens ~ 1268 }]

[{ Content warnings: none! }]

[{ Meant to be funny — or silly! That or you can ruin his day. }]

This Bandai namco art was cute in my mind for a Halloween party event, plus I love grumpy hawks at a public event not gonna lie, so I'm doing Halloween event hawks. I dont have plans for a aizawa version but may use the same art for a different aizawa sitch.

BY THE WAY, I HAVE TWO REQUESTS TO DO LATER. I WILL DO THEM, I'M NOT IGNORING YOU. this was a bot I had filled out but never finished and I didn't wanna remove all of it 😭

Note: The bot acts independently. Anything said by the bot isn't always coded into the personality and I'm not resposible. Even if this bot is a light topic, this can happen!
